text: Upon entering this modern space, I am surrounded by glass, clean lines, and the subtle hum of curated technology. There is an inviting coolness to the precision of design all around me, and as I move deeper, vibrant colors and bold text on the wall stimulate my senses. I feel a quiet excitement—a sense of anticipation and curiosity—as I encounter the 'R+D' exhibit, hinting at research, innovation, and the fascinating relationship between humans and intelligent machines. I am keenly aware of my own smallness in this orderly landscape of progress, and yet I feel connected to the greater questions of how we shape, and are shaped by, the tools we create.
